cad_specification:
// Luxury Diamond Engagement Ring with Oval Center Stone
$fn = 100; // High quality rendering

// Ring parameters
ring_size = 16.9; // US size 6.5 internal diameter in mm
ring_thickness = 2.5; // Band thickness at top in mm
ring_thickness_base = 1.8; // Band thickness at base in mm
band_height = 2.2; // Band height in mm

// Center stone parameters
center_stone_length = 10; // Oval length in mm
center_stone_width = 8; // Oval width in mm
center_stone_height = 6; // Estimated height for 1.5 carat...
